title: Anticipating Network Contagions: When Directedness Outperforms Connectedness — analysis code, data, and prediction-first records
description: Reproducible analysis pipeline for a falsifiable directed-connectedness control diagnostic across seven contagion networks: non-negative VAR(1) surrogates, Diebold-Yilmaz generalized forecast-error-variance connectedness, interdiction simulation, a per-case symmetrization null, every figure, dated prediction-first records, and a deterministic pre-submission verification harness (clean-clone CI, property and metamorphic tests, a symbolic exact oracle, deterministic and adversarial citation checks). CPU-only, pinned environment, fixed seeds, one-command per-figure regeneration.
